prompt: You are reviewing a Python module for a data pipeline used by our analytics team. Refactor the function `normalize_records` in etl/normalize.py to reduce its cyclomatic complexity, without changing its public signature or behavior. Keep the existing docstring accurate. Return only the rewritten function plus a one-paragraph summary of what changed. Constraint: standard library only.
notes: Well-formed: role, task, scope boundary, output spec, and an explicit constraint. Guards against analyzer false positives on healthy prompts.
